australian_relation: ABC public article naming the Majestic Theatre in Pomona and a reported woman-presence/ghost claim at the theatre.
coordinate_evidence_note: ABC page names the Majestic Theatre in Pomona as a paranormal investigation site; coordinates use the state-checked OSM/Nominatim Majestic Theatre point.
evidence_summary: ABC reported that the Majestic Theatre in Pomona was among Queensland locations to be investigated for paranormal activity. Kade Jones said there were strange happenings at the theatre, that apparently there is a woman there, and that reported phenomena included voices, shadow figures, and touching of people's shoulders while a movie was on.
publication_or_organisation: Queensland towns on the Sunshine Coast and in north Queensland get set for ghostbuster tour; 612 ABC Brisbane
title: woman in Majestic Theatre woman presence
